description_long: This structure is a large, light-colored dam with a smooth, curved surface and a prominent central opening. The dam features a wide, bowl-like depression, flanked by high vertical walls and topped with continuous metal railings for safety. One side includes a tall, stair-stepped access platform, also bordered by railings, leading up to the top of the dam. The exterior shows some weathering and graffiti, especially along the lower sections, suggesting urban placement and exposure to the elements. The central opening at the base may serve as a passage or maintenance access, but there are no visible water control mechanisms or spillways. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or concrete, with metal railings and some open air spaces.
description: A large, light-colored dam with smooth curved walls, metal railings, a central opening, and a tall stair-stepped access platform. The exterior shows weathering and graffiti, with no visible water control gates or spillways.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dam's full length, central opening, and the stair-stepped access platform on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view into the wide, bowl-like depression, highlighting the smooth interior and metal railings along the top.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the dam's width, the central opening, and the stair platform extending from the right.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view into the depression, showing the stair platform on the left and the smooth, continuous walls.
